author: HJ
description: Convert local documents (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, HWP, Excel) to Markdown and save into your Obsidian vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Convert local documents (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, HWP, Excel) to Markdown and save into your vault.

name: Document Weaver

releases.author: GS-AX
releases.description:
- Update Supported Formats: accurate capabilities and limitations per format
- Excel: chart extraction marked as not supported
- PDF: scanned PDFs render as page images (not stub note)
- DOCX: chart extraction and .doc limitation documented
- HWP/HWPx: formatting caveats clarified
releases.name: Document Weaver 1.0.11

releases.author: GS-AX
releases.description: - Fix README installation instructions (Community Plugins instead of BRAT)
releases.name: Document Weaver 1.0.10

releases.author: GS-AX
releases.description:
## What's new

- Chart extraction for DOCX and XLSX (DrawingML XML → Markdown table)
- HWPx: fix images appearing at document bottom instead of inline position
- PDF: scale 1.0, reduced crop padding to avoid capturing captions
- README: screenshots added (Korean & English)
releases.name: Document Weaver 1.0.9

releases.author: GS-AX
releases.description:
- Chart extraction for DOCX, XLSX (DrawingML chart XML → markdown table)
- HWPx inline image placement fix
- PDF scale 1.0, reduced crop padding
- README screenshots

releases.author: GS-AX
releases.description:
## New Features

- **Scanned PDF support**: PDFs with no text layer are now rendered page-by-page as JPEG images and embedded directly in the note

## Bug Fixes

- **Excel tables**: Merged cells now show the correct value (no more blank cells), dates/currency use Excel's formatted display, numeric columns auto right-aligned
- **Word tables**: \`colspan\` and \`rowspan\` are now handled correctly — no more misaligned columns from merged cells
- **Image embeds**: Fixed a bug where all documents would show the same images when multiple files had assets with identical filenames (e.g. \`page-001.jpg\`). Asset links now include the full vault path.
releases.name: Document Weaver 1.0.7

releases.author: GS-AX
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- **PDF**: Fixed \"No GlobalWorkerOptions.workerSrc specified\" error — PDF.js worker now runs inline on the main thread, no external worker file needed
- **HWPx**: Fixed empty output — XML namespace-prefixed elements (`<hh:P>`, `<hh:T>`) are now correctly parsed
- **HWPx**: Fixed missing images — BinData path detection improved
- **HWPx**: Fixed missing sections — header.xml auto-detected regardless of path casing
- **HWP**: Improved compatibility with different hwp.js versions (getCharShape typo variants)
releases.name: Document Weaver 1.0.6

releases.author: GS-AX
releases.description: Restore pdfjs-dist for proper Korean PDF (CIDFont) text extraction
releases.name: Document Weaver 1.0.5
